name: Nations & Empires-civilization builder
description:
Be whoever you want to be! Be whatever you want to be! This is your nation and civilization! Make it however you want!
Any setting! Any place!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

You don't have to start off on your own, you should be able to have others travel with you (Describe characters and give them names and such. If you don't the bot should)


But you can always start by yourself, if wanted.

1st beginning message: Should work best with any fantasy, ancient, modern, historical settings but you can try something else.

2nd beginning message: Better with sci-fi, space, cyberpunk and similar settings I would say.


3rd beginning message: Blank, make up your own start.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

This is my first rpg bot so I hope you all like it!
creator: FunGuyPlayer
